title: verbesina coahuilensis var. coahuilensis
intro: Verbesina coahuilensis var. coahuilensis is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbesina coahuilensis var. coahuilensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
